message:
feat(abi,harness): phase-1 dlfcn replacement mode and comprehensive harness test coverage

dlfcn_abi.rs — Major architectural shift from host delegation to native resolution:
- Replace host_delegate! macro and RTLD_NEXT-based dlvsym forwarding with
  a self-contained symbol resolution system that doesn't call back into
  the host dynamic linker
- Introduce main_program_handle() sentinel for dlopen(NULL) which returns
  a stable pointer instead of the host's handle
- Add reference-counted open/close tracking via MAIN_PROGRAM_REFS atomic
- Add is_native_handle() and is_main_program_handle() guards for handle
  validation in dlsym/dlvsym/dlclose
- Add resolve_exported_symbol() that maps known FrankenLibC exports
  (dlopen, dlsym, dlvsym, dlclose, dlerror, malloc, free, printf, puts,
  strlen) to their ABI function pointers
- Add library_alias_matches() recognizing libc.so, libc.so.6,
  libfrankenlibc.so variants for RTLD_NOLOAD queries
- Add version_supported() for GLIBC version string validation in dlvsym
- Remove all DLSYM_REENTRY early-return paths (no longer needed without
  host delegation)
- Add ERR_INVALID_HANDLE error reporting for unknown handles

dlfcn_abi_test.rs — Extended test coverage for the new resolution mode

harness — Comprehensive test infrastructure additions:
- diff.rs: 7 unit tests for render_diff covering identical strings,
  single-line diffs, multiline diffs, header format, and all-changed
- fixtures.rs: 13 unit tests for FixtureSet covering explicit errno,
  null/integer/boolean/array output normalization, metadata parsing,
  multiple cases, roundtrip serialization, invalid JSON, and missing
  fields
- verify.rs: Additional verification test coverage
- minimizer.rs: New ddmin delta-debugging minimizer for conformance
  fixture case reduction (Zeller & Hildebrandt 2002 algorithm)
- lib.rs: Module registration for minimizer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
